'''Rindians''' were an alien race from the [[Rindia system/Legends|Rindia system]]. They were small in stature, had pointed ears, and possessed eight digits on each hand. Their speech was melodious to the hearer.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
